prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Hey there! I know you've been putting this off, but now is the moment to grab the opportunity in front of you. Remember, every step you take, no matter how small, gets you closer to completing this task. You have the strength and ability to tackle this head-on. Think about how good it will feel to cross it off your list! Embrace the challenge, stay focused, and remember that you’ve overcome obstacles before—you can do it again. Let’s dive in and show this task what you’re made of! You've got this! 💪✨
